value.body:
## Summary

Upgrade the Storybook toolchain in `@cycle/ui` from 10.4.2 to 10.4.6.

## Packages

- `@storybook/addon-docs`: 10.4.2 -> 10.4.6
- `@storybook/react-vite`: 10.4.2 -> 10.4.6
- `storybook`: 10.4.2 -> 10.4.6

## Affected manifest

- `packages/ui/package.json`

## Rationale

`pnpm outdated --recursive --format json` reports patch releases for the Storybook packages. These should be upgraded together to keep the Storybook runtime, framework integration, and docs addon aligned.

## Verification

- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/ui storybook:build`.
- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/ui typecheck` if package-level typecheck exists, otherwise `pnpm typecheck`.
- Smoke test Storybook locally with `pnpm storybook`.
value.title: Upgrade Storybook packages to 10.4.6
